creator: doctor@doctor.nl2k.ab.ca
text: There is a version of openssl 1.1.1m and quic which would help the current situation.  I also love Openssl 3 but a many of the servers and languages are not openssl 3 compliant yet. Also Apple OS X reacts nastily to openssl 3 as a server. let us port openssl 1.1.m + quic . I am working with Openssl to convince them to merge the quic patches as mainstream.
